name: Cottage Cheese-Vegetable Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
- Prepare 2 sandwiches.
- 196 calories per sandwich with white bread
- 180 calories per sandwich with whole-wheat bread
1. Combine all ingredients except the bread in a bowl.
2. Spread half of the mixture onto each of two bread slices.
3. Place the remaining bread on top to complete each sandwich.
